doc: PAI-332 public adapter registry. External adapters register here via PR. To be listed an adapter must (a) ship a paimos-adapter.json manifest, (b) pass `paimos skill test-adapter <name>` against its declared supports range, and (c) link to a maintained source repo. The registry is a static JSON file in v1; a separate registry service is a future-PAI follow-up.

manifest.name: claude-code
manifest.description: Claude Code skill markdown adapter — writes to .claude/commands/<slash>.md

manifest.name: opencode
manifest.description: (stub) opencode harness skill renderer — demonstrates the protocol works end-to-end against a non-paimos-bundled adapter.
